projects.name: Personal Agent
projects.description: Personal automation, brand, and opportunity systems.

projects.name: halla-we-tasa
projects.description: Generates Video for Halla We Tasa Brand

goals.title: Run a complete Halla We Tasa pipeline — agent-selected topic through all-agent orchestration — and publish the finished short to all platforms
goals.outcome: A new timestamped run under runs/halla-w-tasa/ that has passed every deterministic gate and visual-QC pass: a fully assembled 24-second vertical short (6 Google Flow clips × 4s, 1080×1920, 24fps) with continuous Egyptian Arabic Gemini TTS narration, a complete submission package (video, thumbnail, copy, hashtags, Meta carousel), and a healthy run-health/retrospective — then published live with AI-content disclosure on every platform that supports it.
goals.completionCriteria:
1. Run created via `npm run video:new -- --brand halla-w-tasa --topic "<topic>"` with topic novelty passing ledger check.
2. Creative package validated: `npm run video:validate-flow -- --run <run-dir> --allow-missing-clips true` passes.
3. Six Flow clips downloaded to `<run-dir>/flow-downloads/clip-01..06.mp4` and validated (`video:validate-flow` + `video:verify-flow-attachments` pass).
4. Per-clip and transition-continuity visual QC archived and PASS (no WARN/FAIL).
5. TTS generated, video assembled, submission finalized, Meta carousel created and validated.
6. Full-video subagent review archived in logs/ ending with `VERDICT: PASS`.
7. `video:health` and `video:retrospect` complete with healthy status.
8. Ledger row updated to `submission_ready` in reports/video-generation-ledger.csv.
9. Published with `--confirm-publish true` to YouTube (public), Meta Reel (Instagram+Facebook), Meta Carousel (Instagram+Facebook), and TikTok via Computer Use — AI/synthetic-content disclosure active on every surface; publish receipts preserved.
goals.nonGoals: Long-form YouTube content (8-12 min episodes — use the long-builder skill instead). Modifying pipeline/deterministic code or validators. Creating cron/launchd/background scheduling. Deleting or overwriting prior runs. Running multiple videos in one run. Manual creative copy/prompt authoring by deterministic modules.
